Yoga is the journey of the self, through the self, to the self.
The body benefits from movement, and the mind benefits from stillness.
Inhale the future, exhale the past.
Yoga is not about touching your toes. It is about what you learn on the way down.
The present moment is the only moment available to us, and it is the door to all moments.
Be still and know.
Yoga teaches us to cure what need not be endured and endure what cannot be cured.
Feelings come and go like clouds in a windy sky. Conscious breathing is my anchor.
Yoga is the fountain of youth. You're only as young as your spine is flexible.
The light in me honors the light in you.
Calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
Yoga is the perfect opportunity to be curious about who you are.
Breath is the bridge which connects life to consciousness.
Yoga does not just change the way we see things; it transforms the person who sees.
The nature of yoga is to shine the light of awareness into the darkest corners of the body.
When you listen to yourself, everything comes naturally.
Yoga is a light, which once lit, will never dim.
The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
Yoga is the space where flower blossoms.
Mindfulness is the aware, balanced acceptance of the present experience.
You cannot do yoga. Yoga is your natural state.
Yoga is the practice of quieting the mind.
The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.
Yoga is not a work-out, it is a work-in.
Be happy in the moment, that's enough.
What you think, you become. What you feel, you attract. What you imagine, you create.
Yoga is the art of awareness on the canvas of the body.
The breath is the link between the body and the mind.
In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
Yoga is the cessation of the fluctuations of the mind.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
The pose begins when you want to leave it.
Yoga is a dance between control and surrender.
Your body exists in the past. Your mind exists in the future. In yoga, they meet in the present.
Let your practice be a refuge, not a performance.
Yoga is the journey of a lifetime.
The mind is everything. What you think you become.
Yoga is the uniting of consciousness in the heart.
Every breath is a chance to begin again.
The mat is a mirror—it reflects what you bring to it.
